label: Flow Tool
description: Invokes another flow's active revision as a single tool call.

tool_name.title: Tool name
tool_name.description: Function name exposed to the LLM (lowercase letters, digits, underscores; must start with a letter).

tool_description.title: Tool description
tool_description.description: Natural-language description the model uses to decide when to call this tool.

target_flow_id.title: Target flow
target_flow_id.description: Callable flow to run when the agent invokes this tool. Only flows marked callable with an active revision appear in the picker.

parameters_schema.title: Parameters schema
parameters_schema.description: JSON Schema for arguments the model may pass. Defines the tool's input shape and becomes the subflow payload when the tool runs.
